stemHtml: There are two modulation types of NDBs: NON/A1A and NON/A2A. Which of the following statements is true?

options.a: The bearing indicator is erratic when an NON/A2A station is identifying.
options.b: The transmitted identification modulation frequency of an NON/A1A station is 1020 Hz.
options.c: In order to identify an NON/A2A station the BFO has to be activated.
options.d: The bearing indicator is erratic when an NON/A1A station is identifying.
